title: Just-In WIZARD HAT
description: Make your world into a element magic world.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/955e4495e5f87df0b71481e1ebeaeca226e5a7cf.png)
This mod introduces an entirely new magic system. You must craft wands and collect various elements, using different alchemical recipes to cast different spells.



In your world, there will eventually be various basic elements to collect. Gather as many as you can, and then combine these basic elements to create more powerful advanced elements, allowing you to cast stronger spells.
